summary: Iteration 29: CuentasDirectoryGrid new columns feature FULLY WORKING. All 7 columns (Cuenta, Depto, Últ. compra, Cant., #Comp., Tel, %YTD) display correctly with proper formatting, colors, and WhatsApp links. Backend API returns all expected fields with correct data types. Sorting works for all new columns. Phone normalization with 51 prefix for Peru 9-digit numbers works correctly.

minor.issue: Slow response time (10-25s) due to KPI CTE query aggregating all sales data. Consider adding database indexes or materialized view.

performance_issues.issue: Initial data load takes 15-30 seconds due to slow backend KPI query. Loading spinner shows during this time.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/cuentas/list returns all 7 new columns (depto_name, last_purchase_date, qty_12m, orders_12m, pct_vs_avg_ytd, phone_display, phone_whatsapp)
Backend: qty_12m and orders_12m are integer types (not float)
Backend: pct_vs_avg_ytd is null when no prior year data, float when data exists
Backend: pct_vs_avg_ytd rounded to 4 decimal places
Backend: last_purchase_date is ISO date string
Backend: phone_whatsapp prepends 51 for 9-digit Peru mobile numbers
Backend: phone_display shows original formatted phone
Backend: raw_phone/raw_mobile removed from response (clean output)
Backend: sort=depto works (city fallback)
Backend: sort=last_purchase works
Backend: sort=qty_12m works (high to low)
Backend: sort=orders_12m works
Backend: sort=pct_ytd works
Backend: Pagination still works with new columns
Backend: Filters (q, estado, ciudad, asignado) still work
Frontend: All 7 column headers visible (Cuenta, Depto, Últ. compra, Cant., #Comp., Tel, %YTD)
Frontend: Sortable headers have up/down arrows and are clickable
Frontend: Tel column non-sortable (as expected)
Frontend: Dates formatted as 'DD-mmm.' (e.g., '15-feb.')
Frontend: Numbers formatted with locale (e.g., '16,368')
Frontend: %YTD shows GREEN for positive values
Frontend: %YTD shows RED for negative values
Frontend: %YTD shows GRAY dash for null values
Frontend: WhatsApp icon (MessageCircle) visible in Tel column for accounts with phones
Frontend: WhatsApp links point to wa.me/{number} with 51 prefix
Frontend: Bulk actions (select, deactivate, activate) still work
Frontend: Detail panel opens on row click
Frontend: Pagination controls (Pag X/Y, prev, next) work
Frontend: Left pane width is 740px as specified
action_items: PERFORMANCE: Consider adding database indexes on pos_order.date_order, partner_id, or create a materialized view for KPI aggregates to speed up /api/cuentas/list
critical_code_review_comments: server.py lines 564-690: KPI CTE query is comprehensive but slow - aggregates ALL sales to compute qty_12m, orders_12m, pct_vs_avg_ytd for every account
server.py _apply_phone(): Correctly normalizes phones, deduplicates same number in phone/mobile, adds 51 prefix for 9-digit Peru mobiles
CuentasDirectoryGrid.jsx: Good use of data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
CuentasDirectoryGrid.jsx: %YTD color logic using emerald-600 (green) and red-600 correctly
CuentasDirectoryGrid.jsx: WhatsApp MessageCircle icon and wa.me link properly implemented
seed_data_creation: None - used existing PostgreSQL data via PG_URL connection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Directory columns feature complete. All 7 columns (Cuenta, Depto, Últ. compra, Cant., #Comp., Tel, %YTD) working. Sort keys are: name, depto, last_purchase, qty_12m, orders_12m, pct_ytd. Phone normalization adds 51 prefix to 9-digit Peru mobiles starting with 9. %YTD shows null as dash, positive as green +X.X%, negative as red -X.X%. API is slow (15-30s) due to KPI CTE query. Left pane width 740px.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - no bugs found. All new directory column features working as specified.
